title: The Missing Shipment
location_hint: under the wooden bench by the side gate
theme: a friendly note from Agent Squirrel about a missing acorn shipment

content_brief.tone_notes: Warm and playful. This is a beginner cache so the tone should feel welcoming and low-stakes — suitable for first-time finders and younger seekers. Difficulty and terrain were specified as Beginner, mapped to 1/1.
must_include: A handwritten-style note attributed to Agent Squirrel
Reference to an acorn shipment that has gone missing under mysterious (but lighthearted) circumstances
A request for the finder's help in reporting the find to KGB HQ
Instructions to sign the logbook and carefully rehide the cache
A warm sign-off from Agent Squirrel
must_avoid: Exact identification of the bench or gate location by name
Dark, threatening, or overly complex spy jargon
Any reference to real public locations, landmarks, or named parks
Content that would exclude or intimidate a first-time geocacher
